channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.mmorpg.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.mmorpg.com

item.title: Once Human is Getting Custom Server Exclusive Game Mode, New Perks, and New Customization Options
item.content:encoded:
Once Human’s custom servers are getting some changes this week, including a new, exclusive game mode, more server host perks, and new customization options.

With the update on Thursday, April 23rd, comes a custom server-exclusive new game mode, RaidZone: Hyper Brawl. This mode will debut with the update and there will be a co-dev test available on that date.  

In this mode, the host can restrict players to certain circular zones on the map  to have greater control over the pace of combat, and if you're the host you can also create different styles of environments by playing around with the elements of the mode. One option you have is You can set up a restricted zone with a definable custom radius where everyone is forced to fight within that zone. If you try to leave the zone, there's a penalty of death.

The team details everything in the update announcement, but there are additional combat and survival adjustment customizations that you  will have access to for the mode. There will also be some mode templates to get everyone going quickly while they're still on their way to creating custom matches. If you want to, you can also share your own personal facilities with the server to establish a few neutral supply points. There are also a few options for trying to keep competition fairer, such as restricting the size of Hives so that large teams just don't steamroll over everyone. 

Outside of this mode, there are another round of custom server features on the way. Hosts will be able to save up to three custom server settings templates. Other options coming include the ability to disable all vehicles, to reduce Hive player capacity, prohibition on certain building types, and additional options that apply only to custom RaidZone servers.

The April 23rd update will also launch a new server host incentive series that will be based on engagement score and award hosts with more favorable benefits and privileges, like reduced server costs.

RaidZone is going to be more flexible overall, based on recent announcements on a more "casual" mode coming.



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/once-human-is-getting-custom-server-exclusive-game-mode-new-perks-and-new-customization-options-2000137847
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
